user_story: As a user I want to register on the system using my email so that I can access the system.
expected_requirements: The system shall allow the user to input this email address.
The system shall validate the email address entered by the user.
The system shall ensure that the email is not already registered.
The system shall send an email verification.
The system shall securely store the user's information after verification.
The system shall send an email verification after successful registration.

user_story: As a user I want to login into the system using my email and password so that I can access my account and use the application securely.
expected_requirements: The system shall allow users to log in using their email and password.
The system shall validate user credentials.
The system shall grant access only after successful authentication.
The system shall display an error message for invalid credentials.
The system shall maintain a secure user session after login.

user_story: As a user i want to reset my password if i forget it so that i can regain access my account
expected_requirements: The system shall allow users to request a password reset.
The system shall verify the registered email address.
The system shall generate a secure password reset token.
The system shall send a password reset link by email.
The system shall allow users to create a new password after successful verification.

user_story: As a user I want to update my profile information so that my personal details remain up to date .
expected_requirements: The system shall allow users to edit their profile information.
The system shall validate updated information.
The system shall save profile changes.
The system shall notify users when the update is successful.

user_story: As a user i want to upload my profile pic so that other users can recognize me
expected_requirements: The system shall allow users to upload a profile picture.
The system shall accept supported image formats.
The system shall validate the uploaded file.
The system shall update the user's profile picture after a successful upload.

user_story: As an admin i want to view all users that are registered so that i can manage all users accounts
expected_requirements: The system shall allow administrators to view all registered users.
The system shall display user information in a list.
The system shall support searching and filtering users.
The system shall restrict this feature to administrators only.

user_story: As an admin I want to deactivate a user's account so that suspended users cannot access the system.
expected_requirements: The system shall allow administrators to deactivate user accounts.
The system shall prevent deactivated users from logging in.
The system shall update the user's account status.
The system shall record the account status change.

user_story: As a customer , I want to search for the products by name or category so that I can find the items quickly as needed.
expected_requirements: The system shall provide a search feature for products.
The system shall allow searching by product name or category.
The system shall display matching search results.
The system shall notify the user when no products are found.

user_story: As a customer i want to able to add products to my shopping cart so that i can buy multiple items together and track the expense
expected_requirements: The system shall allow customers to add products to the shopping cart.
The system shall update item quantities in the cart.
The system shall allow customers to remove items from the cart.
The system shall display the current cart contents with price of each product, total and subtotal.

user_story: As a customer i want to place an order so that i can purchase products online
expected_requirements: The system shall allow customers to place an order.
The system shall validate the order before submission.
The system shall securely process payment information.
The system shall save the order details.
The system shall send an order confirmation to the customer.

user_story: As a customer i want to view list of history of my orders so that i can track my previous purchases
expected_requirements: The system shall allow customers to view their previous orders.
The system shall display order details.
The system shall sort orders by date.
The system shall restrict users to viewing only their own orders.

user_story: As an employee , I want to submit my leave application online so that the manager can review it.
expected_requirements: The system shall allow employees to submit leave requests.
The system shall validate leave request details.
The system shall store leave requests.
The system shall notify the manager of new requests.

user_story: As a manager I want to approve or reject the employee's leave applications
expected_requirements: The system shall allow managers to review leave requests.
The system shall allow managers to approve or reject requests.
The system shall update the leave request status.
The system shall notify employees of the decision.

user_story: As a student i want to register in offered courses so that i can attend my classes
expected_requirements: The system shall display available courses.
The system shall allow students to enroll in eligible courses.
The system shall verify course availability before enrollment.
The system shall update the student's enrollment record.

user_story: As an instructor , I want to upload the student's attendance so students can track their attendance.
expected_requirements: The system shall allow instructors to upload attendance.
The system shall store uploaded attendance records.
The system shall make attendance records available to students.

user_story: As a user I want to logout.
expected_requirements: The system shall allow users to log out.
The system shall terminate the current user session.
The system shall redirect the user to the login page.

user_story: As a customer I want to place an online order using multiple payment methods, apply discount coupons, select a delivery address, review my order before confirming it, receive an order confirmation email, and track the shipment so that I can complete my purchase conveniently.
expected_requirements: The system shall allow customers to add products to an order.
The system shall support multiple payment methods.
The system shall validate discount coupons.
The system shall allow customers to select a delivery address.
The system shall display an order review before confirmation.
The system shall process the payment securely.
The system shall save the order information.
The system shall send an order confirmation email.
The system shall allow customers to track shipment status.

user_story: As a user I want the system to be faster.
expected_requirements: The system shall improve response time.
The system shall optimize performance.

user_story: As a usre i wnat to recive notifcation when my order is shiped.
expected_requirements: The system shall notify users when an order is shipped.
The system shall display shipment status.

user_story: As an administrator I want to create, update, delete and search products so that I can manage the inventory.
expected_requirements: The system shall allow administrators to create products.
The system shall allow administrators to update products.
The system shall allow administrators to delete products.
The system shall allow administrators to search products.
The system shall restrict product management features to administrators.

user_story: As a student I want to download my transcript.
expected_requirements: The system shall allow students to download their transcript.
The system shall generate the transcript document.
The system shall verify student identity before download.

user_story: As a user I want the application to load within two seconds so that I have a better experience.
expected_requirements: The system shall load application pages within two seconds.
The system shall optimize application performance.

user_story: As a user I want two-factor authentication during login so that my account remains secure.
expected_requirements: The system shall support two-factor authentication.
The system shall send a one-time verification code.
The system shall verify the one-time verification code before login.
The system shall grant access only after successful verification.
